Import TensorFlow, Keras, KerasCV, TensorFlow Datasets (tfds), and necessary utilities such as matplotlib.pyplot
Set BATCH_SIZE to 4 and AUTOTUNE to tf.data.AUTOTUNE for dataset pipeline optimization
Disable TensorFlow Datasets progress bar with tfds.disable_progress_bar()
Load the COCO dataset or a similar object detection dataset compatible with keras_cv YOLOv8 example, ensuring it includes bounding boxes and class labels

Define image preprocessing function that resizes images to (640, 640) and converts bounding boxes and labels into the dictionary format expected by KerasCV YOLOv8 model, maintaining batch dimension consistency
Create train and validation datasets by applying map with the preprocessing function, batching with BATCH_SIZE=4, and applying caching and prefetching with AUTOTUNE

Define a data augmentation pipeline that applies keras_cv.layers.CutMix and keras_cv.layers.MixUp sequentially on the training dataset, ensuring the output format remains consistent with the model input requirements
Apply the augmentation pipeline by mapping over the training dataset with num_parallel_calls=AUTOTUNE

Load the keras_cv.models.YOLOV8 model preset (e.g., 'yolov8n') with input_shape=(640, 640, 3) and compile it with an appropriate optimizer, loss, and the COCO evaluation metrics callback (EvaluateCOCOMetricsCallback), passing the validation dataset
Train the model for 3 epochs using model.fit() on the training dataset with validation_data set to the validation dataset and including the EvaluateCOCOMetricsCallback

Observe the training progress; after completion of the first epoch, confirm that an UnknownError occurs during the callback evaluation step indicating a TensorFlow ConcatOp InvalidArgumentError due to mismatched tensor shapes with dimension 1 differing (e.g., shape [4,2,4] vs. [4,1,4])
Verify the traceback points to keras_cv.metrics.object_detection.box_coco_metrics.py in the _box_concat function during concatenation of ground truth boxes
Assert that the error is reproducible consistently when using the CutMix and MixUp augmentations together in the YOLOv8 KerasCV training pipeline with batch size 4 and input size 640x640
Capture and log the shapes of bounding box tensors before concatenation within the metric callback for debugging, confirming inconsistent dimensions on axis 1
Validate that removing CutMix and MixUp augmentations prevents the error, confirming the bug is linked to these augmentations affecting bounding box tensor shapes
